name: yzmir-deep-rl
description: Reinforcement learning - DQN/Rainbow/R2D2/BBF, PPO/GRPO, SAC/TD3/REDQ/DroQ/CrossQ, DreamerV3/TD-MPC2 model-based, CQL/IQL/TD3+BC/AWAC/Decision Transformer offline, MAPPO/IPPO multi-agent, Go-Explore/NGU exploration, reward shaping, counterfactual reasoning. Includes 13 reference sheets, 3 commands (diagnose, scaffold-experiment, select-algorithm), 2 agents (rl-training-diagnostician, reward-function-reviewer).
